name: person_works_at_company
description: Meeting recap mentioning one person and one company
content: I had a meeting with Jordan Chen from Acme Corp about the Q3 roadmap. Jordan is the VP of Product there.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with 'entities' and 'relationships' arrays
entities include a person named 'Jordan Chen'
entities include a company named 'Acme Corp'
At least 1 relationship has sourceName 'Jordan Chen', relationship 'works_at', targetName 'Acme Corp'
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: multiple_entities_and_tools
description: Project description mentioning team members and tools
content: The mobile launch project team is Lena Park (design), Marcus Chen (engineering), and me. We're using Figma for designs and Linear for project tracking.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include a project (e.g., 'Mobile Launch')
entities include persons 'Lena Park' and 'Marcus Chen'
entities include tools 'Figma' and 'Linear'
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.
At least 1 relationship connects the project to either Figma or Linear via 'uses'

name: reports_to_relationship
description: New-hire announcement with explicit reporting relationship
content: Sarah joined my team this month. She reports to me and will lead the pricing workstream.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include a person 'Sarah'
At least 1 relationship with type 'reports_to' has Sarah as the source
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: empty_content
description: Journaling content with no entities or relationships
content: Had a quiet morning. Drank coffee and thought about life.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities array is empty
relationships array is empty

name: canonical_naming
description: Person referenced by both short and full name — should produce one entity with canonical form
content: Dan (Dan Cole) just joined us as CRO. Dan reports directly to me and owns our entire revenue org.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
Exactly one person entity for Dan Cole — not separate entries for 'Dan' and 'Dan Cole'
The person entity uses the fuller name 'Dan Cole'
At least 1 relationship with type 'reports_to' has Dan Cole as the source
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: topic_entity
description: Research session mentioning an abstract topic and specific tools
content: Spent the afternoon researching vector databases for our RAG setup. Pinecone and Weaviate are the main options.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include at least one entry whose name contains 'vector database', 'RAG', or 'vector db' (case-insensitive) — acceptable types include topic, project, or tool
entities include tools 'Pinecone' and 'Weaviate'
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: location_entity
description: Event planning note mentioning a city and hotel
content: The team offsite is in Denver in May. Booked the Crawford Hotel downtown.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include 'Denver' as a location
No month-word like 'May' appears as an entity

name: blocks_relationship
description: Project status note with explicit blocking relationship
content: The API migration is blocking the mobile launch. We can't ship until the new endpoints are live.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include 'API Migration' and 'Mobile Launch' as projects
At least 1 relationship with type 'blocks' exists from API Migration to Mobile Launch

name: collaborates_with
content: I've been pairing with Alex Rivera on the checkout redesign all week. He's the product lead on their side.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include a person 'Alex Rivera'
At least 1 relationship connects Alex Rivera to the checkout redesign project (any relationship type — collaborates_with, works_on, part_of)
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: no_fabrication_from_ambiguous
description: Content with only vague/ambiguous mentions and no concrete entities
content: Someone mentioned a new AI tool at the all-hands but I forgot the name.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
No entity has a name that was invented (no 'someone', no fabricated tool name, no fabricated person)
entities and relationships arrays are either empty or contain only explicitly-named items

name: discussed_in_relationship
content: In my 1:1 with Patricia, we discussed the Q3 roadmap, the hiring plan, and the new office in Austin.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include a person 'Patricia'
entities include 'Q3 Roadmap' (or similar), 'Hiring Plan' (or similar)
entities include 'Austin' as a location
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: multi_company_people
description: Joint session with attendees from 3 different companies
content: Joint session with Sarah Kim (Stripe), Marcus Chen (our team), and Priya Nair (Figma) about payment flow integration.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include persons Sarah Kim, Marcus Chen, and Priya Nair
entities include companies 'Stripe' and 'Figma'
At least 1 relationship with type 'works_at' connects Sarah Kim to Stripe
At least 1 relationship with type 'works_at' connects Priya Nair to Figma

name: manages_relationship
description: Team listing with explicit management relationship
content: My team: I manage Lena Park, Marcus Chen, and Alex Rivera.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include persons Lena Park, Marcus Chen, and Alex Rivera
Each of the three persons has a 'reports_to' or 'manages' relationship consistent with being on the user's team
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry. Relationships may legitimately use targetName='user'.

name: owns_relationship
content: Kai Nakamura owns the launch marketing plan. He's driving it end to end.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include a person 'Kai Nakamura'
entities include a project or initiative corresponding to the launch marketing plan
At least 1 relationship with type 'owns' or 'produced_by' connects Kai to the plan

name: depends_on
content: The data warehouse migration depends on the auth service upgrade — we need the new tokens before we can run the backfill.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include projects for the data warehouse migration and the auth service upgrade
At least 1 relationship with type 'depends_on' or 'blocks' connects the two projects

name: uses_tool_relationship
description: Statement about another person's tool usage
content: Jen uses Claude for research and writing tasks. She swears by the long context.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
entities include a person 'Jen'
entities include a tool 'Claude'
At least 1 relationship with type 'uses' connects Jen to Claude

name: no_user_as_entity
description: User describes own work, no external people mentioned
content: I'm working on the pricing deck today. It's my main focus.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
The entities array does NOT contain any user-referencing entry (no person entity named user, me, I, or the user's name). Relationships may legitimately reference targetName='user'.

name: plain_list_no_relationships
description: Team roster with names only, no relational context
content: Team roster: Lena, Marcus, Alex, Sarah, Priya.
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object
All 5 persons (Lena, Marcus, Alex, Sarah, Priya) are extracted as entities
No invented company or project appears in entities
